task: Fold the grey thing in half
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A bed with a wooden headboard is visible. On the bed, there is a grey rectangular object (likely a blanket or sheet) and a white pillow. The grey object is spread out on the bed. STRATEGY - First, reach and grasp the grey object. Then, fold it in half by bringing one end over the other. The folding action requires a grasp on the object's edge and a rotation to align the ends. Failure modes include dropping the object or misaligning the fold. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach the grey object to grasp it. Step 2: Grasp the edge of the grey object to lift it. Step 3: Transport the object to a position where folding can occur. Step 4: Fold the object in half by rotating it around a central axis. Step 5: Place the folded object back on the bed.**
Goal: folded(grey_thing)
Scene: bed, grey_thing, pillow
Step 1: reach(grey_thing)
  affordance_region: the body of the grey thing
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, grey_thing, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, grey_thing) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(grey_thing)
  affordance_region: the edge of the grey thing
  contact: holding(grey_thing) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(grey_thing)
Step 3: transport(grey_thing -> bed)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the bed
  spatial: above(grey_thing, bed, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(grey_thing)
  done_when: above(grey_thing, bed, 0.05)
Step 4: fold(grey_thing)
  affordance_region: the edge of the grey thing
  contact: holding(grey_thing) [progress]
  spatial: aligned(grey_thing, bed) [progress]
  direction: fold_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: folded(grey_thing)
Step 5: place(grey_thing -> bed)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the bed
  contact: surface_contact(grey_thing, bed) [completion]; released(grey_thing) [completion]
  pose: stable(grey_thing) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(grey_thing, bed) AND released(grey_thing)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the grey thing
the edge of the grey thing
an empty area on the bed
the edge of the grey thing
an empty area on the bed
